name: Felgrand Dragon
name_jp: フェルグラントドラゴン
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned except from the Graveyard, and only if it was sent there from the field. If this card is Special Summoned: Target 1 monster in your Graveyard; this card gains ATK equal to that monster's Level x 200.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned except from the Graveyard, and only if it was sent there from the field. If this card is Special Summoned: Target 1 monster in your Graveyard; this card gains ATK equal to that monster's Level x 200.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned except from the Graveyard, and only if it was sent there from the field. If this card is Special Summoned: Target 1 monster in your Graveyard; this card gains ATK equal to that monster's Level x 200.

sets.set: Rise of the Dragon Lords Structure Deck
Rise of the True Dragons Structure Deck

summoning: Cannot be Special Summoned except by a specific method
Cannot be Special Summoned from the hand
Cannot be Special Summoned from the Deck
Cannot be Special Summoned from the Spell & Trap Zone
Cannot be Special Summoned while banished
